title: Building Real-World Grafana Dashboards
subtitle: Open Source North 2026
body: Live demos stay in the same browser with inline Grafana embeds.
Arrow keys or on-screen controls advance the story.

title: Demo: Home Overview
notes: Replace the URL with your local Grafana dashboard when presenting.

title: Mortgage Burndown Takeaways
body: Synthetic dataset mirrors a $600k / 30-year loan for privacy.
Grafana transformations split principal vs. escrow vs. remaining balance.
What-if toggles showcase extra payments without leaving the deck.

title: Demo: Classic Marathon Tracker
notes: Point this at the marathon dashboard once built.

title: Wrap-Up
body: Dashboards succeed when the audience question is explicit.
Keep data freshness visible: timestamps, status badges, annotations.
Reuse this deck server to avoid Cmd+Tab chaos.
